params.name: Keyhole Satellite
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF), Nebula Chest (1.5%)
params.description:
On Oct 11, 1960, the first photographic reconnaissance satellite was launched and it orbited for dozens of days.

This is a detection satellite with super night vision. It can change its trajectory, and carry out information acquisition and processing at high resolution. People found its blind spot after calculations, so if the target is hidden when the satellite goes over its head, the surveillance fails.
